generated_exposure.exposure_text: New report shows foreign extremists are exploiting loopholes in our domestic security laws. While some worry about civil liberties, we can't afford to wait until another attack happens. Strengthening our security powers isn't about restricting freedoms - it's about protecting them. Our allies are already taking similar measures. #NationalSecurityFirst #ProtectOurValues
